languages.text: Лария фанатично предана отцу. Чтобы она решилась поддержать переговоры с Инквизицией, нужно предъявить нечто по-настоящему весомое.

traits.locale_text: Лария фанатично предана отцу. Чтобы она решилась поддержать переговоры с Инквизицией, нужно предъявить нечто по-настоящему весомое.

languages.text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly compelling must be presented.
languages.original_text: Лария фанатично предана отцу. Чтобы она решилась поддержать переговоры с Инквизицией, нужно предъявить нечто по-настоящему весомое.

traits.locale_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly substantial must be presented.
Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly substantial must be presented.
Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly compelling must be presented.
Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly compelling must be presented.

languages.text: Laria ist eine fanatische Anhängerin ihres Vaters. Um sie dazu zu bewegen, mit der Inquisition zu verhandeln, bedarf es eines wirklich zwingenden Grundes.
languages.original_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly compelling must be presented.

traits.locale_text: Laria ist eine fanatische Anhängerin ihres Vaters. Um sie dazu zu bewegen, mit der Inquisition zu verhandeln, bedarf es eines wirklich zwingenden Grundes.

languages.text: Laria a une dévotion fanatique envers son père. Pour la convaincre d'approuver les négociations avec l'Inquisition, il faut lui présenter des arguments de poids.
languages.original_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly compelling must be presented.

traits.locale_text: Laria a une dévotion fanatique envers son père. Pour la convaincre d'approuver les négociations avec l'Inquisition, il faut lui présenter des arguments de poids.

languages.text: 菈丽雅狂热地忠诚于她的父亲。要说服她支持与审判庭谈判，必须拿出真正有分量的理由。
languages.original_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly compelling must be presented.

traits.locale_text: 菈丽雅狂热地忠诚于她的父亲。要说服她支持与审判庭谈判，必须拿出真正有分量的理由。

languages.text: Laria profesa una devoción fanática hacia su padre. No apoyará las negociaciones con la Inquisición a menos que se le presente un argumento de mucho peso.
languages.original_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly compelling must be presented.

traits.locale_text: Laria profesa una devoción fanática hacia su padre. No apoyará las negociaciones con la Inquisición a menos que se le presente un argumento de mucho peso.

languages.text: ラリアは熱狂的に父親を愛している。異端審問官との交渉に応じようとするならば、彼女は本当の主張をしなければならない。
languages.original_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. If she is to be willing to support negotiations with the Inquisition, she must make a real case.

languages.text: Laria, babasına fanatik bir şekilde bağlı. Onu Engizisyon ile müzakereleri desteklemeye ikna etmek için gerçekten ikna edici bir şey sunulmalı.
languages.original_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly compelling must be presented.

traits.locale_text: Laria, babasına fanatik bir şekilde bağlı. Onu Engizisyon ile müzakereleri desteklemeye ikna etmek için gerçekten ikna edici bir şey sunulmalı.
